title: Skyhunter: Velocity (Project StormHunters Survival)
description:
This is a Modpack with the new Weather Mod "Protomanly's Weather". It features a Multiplayer mod and Optimization mods



 Feel free to request changes if needed
body:
Project StormHunters

Get ready for an intense survival challenge in Project StormHunters! This modpack blends thrilling multiplayer action, extreme weather conditions, and enhanced performance optimizations for an unforgettable experience.

🌍 Multiplayer Ready – Join forces with friends, build epic bases, and conquer the tornadoes together!

🌪️ Dynamic Weather System – Brace yourself for powerful storms and devastating tornadoes that will change the way you survive.

⚡ Performance Optimizations – Enjoy smoother gameplay with tweaks for better stability and reduced lag.

Are you ready to face the storm? Team up, adapt, and overcome the forces of nature in Project StormHunters!
